entities.name: UNION CATALOG OF SERIALS
entities.description: A compiled list of serial publications from 14 international agricultural research centers

entities.name: ICRISAT LIBRARY AND DOCUMENTATION SERVICES
entities.description: The department responsible for compiling the union catalog of serials

entities.name: CGIAR DOCUMENTATION AND INFORMATION SERVICES
entities.description: The group whose 1987 meeting recommendations led to the creation of the catalog

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL POTATO CENTER
entities.description: An international agricultural research center located in Lima that hosted the CGIAR meeting

entities.name: LIMA
entities.description: The city in Peru where the International Potato Center is located

entities.name: CATALOG PRODUCTION SOFTWARE
entities.description: A modified software tool used at ICRISAT to produce the catalog of serials

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL SERIALS DATA SYSTEM
entities.description: A system providing guidelines and rules for bibliographic description and codification

entities.name: CAB INTERNATIONAL THESAURUS
entities.description: A thesaurus used for indexing the serial titles in the catalog

entities.name: AVRDC
entities.description: An international agricultural research center that provided entries for the catalog
